questions.question: How does NovaAI's performance review cycle work?
questions.ground_truth_answer: NovaAI runs a bi-annual performance review cycle. The mid-year review calibration happens in July with results delivered by July 31. The annual review calibration is in January with results by January 31. Ratings use a 5-point scale (Exceptional, Exceeds Expectations, Meets Expectations, Developing, Unsatisfactory). A rating of Developing or below triggers a PIP within 30 days.

questions.question: What is the annual L&D budget per employee and how does it work?
questions.ground_truth_answer: Each employee receives a $2,500 annual L&D budget, refreshed on January 1. Unused budget does not roll over. Requests must be submitted via the Workday L&D portal.
questions.raw_answer:
**NovaAI Annual Learning & Development (L&D) Budget – FY 2025** | Item | Detail | |------|--------| | **Per‑employee budget** | **$2,000 USD** per fiscal year | | **Allocation split** | • **$1,500** for *external* courses, certifications, conferences, or workshops
• **$500** for *internal* training (e.g., NovaAI‑hosted workshops, internal certification programs, or skill‑building sessions) | | **Eligibility** | All full‑time employees (including contractors on a full‑time basis) who have completed their probationary period (first 90 days). Part‑time employees receive a prorated amount based on hours worked. | | **Reimbursement policy** | • Employees must **pre‑approve** any spend that exceeds **$200** (external) or **$100** (internal).
• After approval, employees submit receipts via the L&D portal; HR processes reimbursement within 5 business days. | | **Request workflow** | 1. **Log in** to the NovaAI Learning Management System (LMS).
2. **Open a Learning Request Form** (LRF).
3. **Fill in** course details, cost, and justification.
4. **Submit** to your direct manager for approval.
5. Manager reviews, ensures alignment with role objectives, and forwards to HR L&D Coordinator.
6. HR L&D Coordinator verifies budget availability and sends final approval or denial. | | **Tracking & reporting** | • The LMS automatically tracks spend against the $2,000 cap.
• Managers receive monthly email reminders when an employee’s remaining budget falls below $500.
• At fiscal year‑end, the L&D team generates a “Learning Spend Report” for each employee and for the department. | | **Budget reset** | The $2,000 allocation resets on **January 1** of each fiscal year. Unused funds **do not roll over**. | | **Special cases** | • **Project‑specific training**: If a project requires a skill set not covered by the standard budget, employees may request an *additional* $1,000. This must be approved by the L&D Director and the project sponsor.
• **Emergency learning** (e.g., urgent compliance training) can be fast‑tracked via the “Urgent L&D Request” portal; the L&D Director reviews and approves within 24 hours. | | **Contact points** | • **L&D Coordinator** – L&D@novaai.com
• **HR Learning Team** – hr‑learning@novaai.com
• **Manager** – first line of approval | ### How It Works in Practice 1. **Planning** – At the start of the fiscal year, each manager reviews their team’s L&D needs and allocates a portion of the $2,000 budget to each employee. 2. **Request** – An employee identifies a relevant course (e.g., “Advanced Machine Learning” on Coursera). They fill out the LRF, attach the course catalog link, and provide a brief justification. 3. **Approval** – The manager checks that the request aligns with the employee’s development plan and the team’s objectives. Once approved, the request moves to HR. 4. **Reimbursement** – After the course, the employee submits the invoice/receipt. HR verifies the amount against the approved budget and processes the payment. 5. **Tracking** – The LMS updates the employee’s remaining budget in real time. Managers can view their team’s spend in the “Team L&D Dashboard.” 6. **Review** – At year‑end, the L&D Director reviews overall spend to assess whether the $2,000 cap is appropriate or needs adjustment for the next fiscal year. **Quick FAQ** | Question | Answer | |----------|--------| | *Can I use the budget for a conference?* | Yes, up to $1,500 for external conferences. | | *What if I exceed the $2,000 cap?* | You must seek a special exception from the L&D Director; unused funds do not roll over. | | *Do I get a stipend for internal training?* | The $500 internal portion is earmarked for internal workshops, but you can request additional internal training if it’s essential for your role. | If you have any questions about a specific request or need help navigating the LMS, please contact the L&D Coordinator at **L&D@novaai.com**.
questions.final_answer:

2. **Open a Learning Request Form** (LRF).
3. **Fill in** course details, cost, and justification.
4. **Submit** to your direct manager for approval.
5. Manager reviews, ensures alignment with role objectives, and forwards to HR L&D Coordinator.

• Managers receive monthly email reminders when an employee’s remaining budget falls below $500.
• At fiscal year‑end, the L&D team generates a “Learning Spend Report” for each employee and for the department. | | **Budget reset** | The $2,000 allocation resets on **January 1** of each fiscal year.
